name: Camp Shelby
description_short: Camp Shelby Federal Credit Union is a military-focused credit union established in 1967, serving 2,900+ members with $26.6M in assets from its Camp Shelby, MS headquarters.
description_long:
Camp Shelby Federal Credit Union was established in 1967 and is headquartered in Camp Shelby, Mississippi. As a federally chartered credit union, it operates as a member-owned financial cooperative serving a specific community with deep roots in military service. The institution has grown to steward over $26.6 million in assets while maintaining a single-branch operation supplemented by one ATM.

The credit union offers a comprehensive range of consumer banking services including checking and savings accounts, auto loans, personal loans, certificates of deposit (CDs), wire transfers, and bill pay. Members can access remote deposit capture, e-statements, electronic signature authentication, drive-thru teller service, and online loan payments. The institution also provides financial counseling and mortgage loans, positioning itself as a full-service financial provider for its membership base of 2,900+ loyal customers.

Camp Shelby's primary distinguishing factor is its exclusive focus on military personnel, Department of Defense employees, and their families. This specialized membership eligibility creates a community-oriented institution tailored to the unique financial challenges of the military community. The website emphasizes personal relationships, with customer reviews highlighting staff treating members "like family" and demonstrating patience and willingness to help with financial needs.

The credit union currently faces operational challenges, with both lobby and drive-thru hours listed as "currently closed" and website status indicating potential service issues. With only 7 dedicated employees and a single branch, the institution has limited physical presence and capacity. Members should verify current operating hours and service availability before attempting to conduct in-person transactions. The small size, while enabling personalized service, may limit product flexibility and convenience compared to larger financial institutions. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Checking accounts (Share Draft accounts with 1,300+ members)
Mortgages (home purchase, refinance, and other mortgage options)
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) (100+ members with share certificates)
pros: Specialized membership serving military personnel, DoD employees, and their families with tailored financial services
Established 57-year history (founded 1967) indicating institutional stability and community trust
Offers full suite of banking products including checking, savings, auto loans, personal loans, CDs, and mortgages
Provides modern digital services: remote deposit capture, e-statements, electronic signature authentication, and online loan payments
Personal, relationship-driven service model with reported staff going above and beyond for members
Lower overhead structure as credit union enables competitive rates on savings and loans
Financial counseling services available to help members make informed financial decisions
cons: Lobby and drive-thru currently closed with no operating hours posted, limiting access to in-person services
Single branch location in Camp Shelby, MS provides minimal geographic convenience for members outside the immediate area
Only 1 ATM available, creating cash access limitations compared to larger banking networks
Website indicates potential ongoing service issues affecting online banking and mobile app stability
Extremely small staff (7 employees) may result in limited availability and slower service response times
best_for: Active duty military personnel and their immediate families seeking specialized financial services
Department of Defense civilian employees looking for military-community-focused banking
Members living in or near Camp Shelby, MS who value relationship-based personal banking
Military families seeking mortgage loans and long-term financial planning assistance
diagnosis: Best for military-connected individuals near Camp Shelby, MS seeking relationship-based banking with military-community focus. Primary caveat: current operational challenges (closed lobby/drive-thru, service issues) and extremely limited branch/ATM network make this impractical for most consumers outside the immediate Camp Shelby area or requiring reliable in-person access.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
